regions.name: Seoul
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring (April-May) or autumn (September-October) for mild weather and clear skies.

regions.name: Incheon
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for comfortable coastal weather and beach exploration.

regions.name: Gyeonggi
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or fall for pleasant temperatures and agricultural scenery.

regions.name: Gangwon
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in summer for mountain hiking and winter for skiing at world-class resorts.

regions.name: North Chungcheong
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for temple visits and mountain scenery.

regions.name: South Chungcheong
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn to explore coastal areas and cultural heritage sites.

regions.name: Daejeon
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit year-round for museums and technology attractions with best conditions in spring and autumn.

regions.name: North Jeolla
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for food festivals and traditional cultural experiences.

regions.name: South Jeolla
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for island exploration and fresh seafood.

regions.name: Gwangju
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring for flower festivals and year-round for art and cultural museums.

regions.name: North Gyeongsang
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in autumn for fall colors and cultural heritage exploration or spring for pleasant weather.

regions.name: Daegu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn to avoid summer heat and explore textile museums and temples.

regions.name: South Gyeongsang
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for coastal scenery and cultural festivals.

regions.name: Busan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for pleasant coastal weather and beach activities.

regions.name: Ulsan
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for industrial heritage tours and nearby mountain attractions.

regions.name: Jeju
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit in spring or autumn for mild weather and clear views; winter for whale watching.
